finding: The next review must be a narrow executable packet, not another broad readiness pass.
evidence: NEXT_REVIEW_PACKET.md names the fresh sTA audit inputs, commands, stop/go gates, semantic review order, BU hold/advance condition, and print-feasibility checklist.
recommended_fix: Use NEXT_REVIEW_PACKET.md as the operator entrypoint until fresh sTA is audited and BU is cleared or held.

finding: The next production review is fresh sTA output, not broad manual reading or BU.
evidence: root_window_status.py sTA reports stale_artifact while the root window is structurally ready with 123 sub-cards.
recommended_fix: Run the generated optimized Max harness for sTA, save fresh wf_output.json, then run python src\pilot\audit_window.py wf_output.json --root sTA --write-requeue.

finding: Mechanical Python gates must be reviewed before semantic or print review.
evidence: audit_window.py is the canonical stale/provenance, NWS, markup, coverage, sense-duplicate, and prompt-rule audit path.
recommended_fix: Read audit_window.report.md and requeue.keys.txt after fresh sTA; regenerate requeue harness only for named failing keys.

finding: Print publication and immutable edition remain blocked by missing human review evidence.
evidence: preflight_remaining_gates.py and release_readiness.py report G5, G6, G7, and G10 blocked.
recommended_fix: Complete G5 src/_review_queue.csv, G6 gold/_human_gold_review.csv, and G7 gold/_double_review_queue.csv with their validation commands before edition cut.

finding: Accepted cards must be traceable to source input, rootmap/input hashes, workflow metadata, audit report, review status, and edition manifest.
evidence: Current stale wf_output.json cannot be used as publication evidence; audit_window.py refuses stale artifacts.
recommended_fix: Accept only fresh audited workflow output, then carry review status into any later immutable edition manifest.

finding: Human semantic review should start from ranked deterministic queues, not whole-window browsing.
evidence: prompt_semantic and judge_sample.keys.txt separate high-confidence risks from clean-card sampling.
recommended_fix: After mechanical gates pass, review prompt_semantic high-confidence risks first and judge_sample.keys.txt second.

finding: Full PWG throughput cannot be priced from stale recovery alone.
evidence: Current status provides sTA structure and stale-output recovery, but not enough clean-window data.
recommended_fix: Record wall-clock and token fields for sTA, BU, and gam before deciding Max-seat versus paid API strategy.

finding: A 10-root Max push would mix clean-ready roots with roots that still have stale generated inputs.
evidence: root_window_status.py shows sTA structurally ready but stale-output blocked; BU/as/i clean-ready after harness generation; gam/yuj/vid/han need prune and recheck.
recommended_fix: Run staged roots: fresh sTA first, then BU/as/i one root at a time, then prune/recheck gam/yuj/vid/han before any Max spend.

finding: Renderer work needs locked rules for citation compaction, nested labels, homonym blocks, NWS badges, Nachtraege, and source-token display.
evidence: PRINT_ENTRY_EXAMPLES.md exposes these issues in agni, akzara, and ap.
recommended_fix: Use PRINT_ENTRY_SPEC.md and PRINT_ENTRY_EXAMPLES.md to lock display policy before implementing PDF, LaTeX, or HTML rendering.

finding: Outside-scholar reproduction exists as components but not yet as a single recipe.
evidence: Source XML, rootmap/input hashes, audit reports, review status, release readiness, and manifests are documented in separate places.
recommended_fix: Before immutable release, add a recipe from source XML through audited workflow output and review status to edition manifest.

finding: Print front matter is not yet assembled as one edition object.
evidence: Method, license, DOI plan, source policy, examples, and QA gates exist as separate docs.
recommended_fix: Create front matter after the reviewed core tranche: editorial principles, abbreviation/sigla list, source table, QA method, limitations, license, and DOI statement.

finding: Citation and DOI metadata are provisional until an edition cut exists.
evidence: CITATION.cff and DOI_PLAN.md describe pre-release status and DOI path.
recommended_fix: At edition cut, update citation version, DOI, release date, manifest checksums, and rights statement.
